center.name: 柴达木盆地
center.summary: 柴达木盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括荒漠伯劳，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in an extensive area between the Caspian Sea and north and central China southeast to the Qaidam Basin

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in an extensive area between the Caspian Sea and north and central China southeast to the Qaidam Basin
